message.content:
@startuml
participant "User" as User
participant "pub.com" as pub
participant "prebid.js" as prebid
participant "prebid_[SSP_MODULE].js" as sspmodule
participant "SSPs" as SSPs
participant "DSPs" as DSPs
participant "gam.js" as gam
participant "GAM/AdX" as GAMAdX

User -> pub : 1. navigates browser to pub.com
pub -> prebid : 2. load, configure, execute prebid.js
prebid -> sspmodule : 3. invoke SSP bid adapter
sspmodule -> SSPs : 4. ad request
SSPs -> SSPs : 5. traffic quality controls
SSPs -> DSPs : 6. make bid requests
DSPs -> SSPs : 7. respond with bids
SSPs -> SSPs : 8. pub ad controls
SSPs -> sspmodule : 9. ad w/price
sspmodule -> prebid : 10. ad w/price
prebid -> prebid : 11. select appropriate ad
prebid -> gam : 12. configure k/v pair for selected ad
gam -> prebid : 13. wait for ad slot to load

note over User, gam : At this point control over the ad loading process is transferred from Prebid.js to GAM (final selection layer)

pub -> GAMAdX : 14. load slot
GAMAdX -> GAMAdX : 15. ad request
GAMAdX -> gam : 16. respond with winning ad, which may be prebid.js line item

alt [GAM/AdX highest bid]
    GAMAdX -> gam : 17.1 render GAM/AdX result
else [Prebid.js highest bid]
    gam -> pub : 17.2 render selected SSP ad
end

gam -> User : 18. show highest value advertisement

@enduml
